stressSecurityPattern.underPressure: worst-case chaining and rapid doubt loops

relationalFieldProfile.intimateBehavior: protects attachment through selective disclosure and worst-case chaining and rapid doubt loops
relationalFieldProfile.kinshipRole: carries household continuity by guarding legacy fracture from witness scrutiny
relationalFieldProfile.powerWorkBehavior: reads hierarchy through loyalty signals, weak seams, and authority reliability and answers with controlled leverage
relationalFieldProfile.socialGroupBehavior: tests group safety before trust by tracking risk-minimizing; delays commitment until signal confidence rises

languageUnderPressure.sentenceStructure: conditional phrasing, risk qualifiers, and repeated verification cues
languageUnderPressure.silenceVsSpeech: uses silence as control gate before speech clears social risk
languageUnderPressure.emotionalExpression: vigilant tension alternating with loyal attachment
languageUnderPressure.abstractionVsEmbodiment: routes abstraction into body cues, object handling, and spatial relation before naming
